steps.title: Identify the outcomes
steps.content: There are $8$ houses total, and $3$ of them have red doors. The favorable outcomes are the houses with red doors.

steps.title: Apply probability
steps.content: Use favorable outcomes over total outcomes.

steps.title: Substitute the counts
steps.content: Substitute $3$ favorable houses and $8$ total houses. $$P=\frac{3}{8}$$ The answer is B.
